# Product barcode required

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:a3f3a7c1868a6b8c87620476272015725e07e293b24d7103502e48ed1a904650
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Makes barcode field required, defaults it to product's code.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

Go to "Settings -> General -> Products" and enable "Product variant barcode required".

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/product-attribute/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/product-attribute/issues/new?body=module:%20product_barcode_required%0Aversion:%2014.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_barcode_required.models.product_barcode_mixin.BarcodeRequiredMixin._check_barcode_required
documentation: Check if barcode required, to be used in your own constraint.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_barcode_required.tests.test_barcode.TestBarcodeDefault.test_onchange_default_template
documentation: Nothing changes since the constraint is not enabled.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_barcode_required.tests.test_barcode.TestBarcodeDefault.test_onchange_default_variant
documentation: Nothing changes since the constraint is not enabled.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_barcode_required.tests.test_barcode.TestBarcodeTemplateRequired.test_onchange_required_template
documentation: Requirement enabled, default barcode to default_code.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_barcode_required.tests.test_barcode.TestBarcodeTemplateRequired.test_required_template
documentation: Requirement enabled, template needs it only if 1 variant is there.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_barcode_required.tests.test_barcode.TestBarcodeTemplateRequired.test_onchange_required_variant
documentation: Requirement enabled, default barcode to default_code.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_barcode_required.tests.test_barcode.TestBarcodeTemplateRequired.test_validation_create
documentation: Cannot create a record w/out barcode as constraint is enabled.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_barcode_required.tests.test_barcode.TestBarcodeTemplateRequired.test_validation_write
documentation: Cannot write a record w/out barcode as constraint is enabled.
